ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Designs and crafts ceramic and glass products, such as tableware, decorative items, and architectural features.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: Develops concepts, sketches, and prototypes for ceramic and glass products, considering factors like aesthetics, functionality, and production feasibility. Collaborates with manufacturers to ensure efficient production processes and high-quality final products.

first_stepper.description: Standard route for a high school student.
target_degrees: B.F.A. in Ceramics or Glass Design

choice_maker.description: Has a generic degree, needs a bridge.
certifications_or_bridge_needed: Certificate in Ceramics or Glass Design

future_builder.description: Already in the sector, looking to advance.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 2 years as Junior Designer in Ceramics or Glass
advanced_skills_to_learn: Digital Design Software (e.g., Blender, Adobe Creative Suite)

problem_solver_uturn.description: Switching from an unrelated field. No degree required.
portfolio_proof_required: Ceramic or glass art pieces created within the last 2 years

progression.senior_level: Lead Designer or Creative Director (5+ yrs)

roadmap.title: Foundational Skills
resources_keywords: Online courses on ceramics and glass design

roadmap.title: Capstone Project and Portfolio
topics: Create a ceramic or glass art piece
